child_sections.title: ETHIOPIAN STATISTICAL SERVICE
child_sections.summary: The Ethiopian Statistical Service publishes monthly statistical bulletins, like this Issue No. 21/2017 report on March EFY 2017, focusing on key economic indicators such as the Consumer Price Index (CPI). The report indicates a general inflation rate of 13.6% in March EFY 2017 compared to the same month the previous year, showing a steady decline from March EFY 2016. It further breaks down this inflation into food and non-food components, illustrating their respective year-on-year changes.
